name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = <<0, 0>>
        /\ turn = 0

Next == /\ state' = <<1, 0>>
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsThinking(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsHungry(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "occupied", ![RIGHT(i)] = "occupied"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsEating(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "occupied"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "occupied"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"]

(* Invariant: No two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
NoAdjacentEating == \A i \in 1..N :
                    /\ IsEating(i)
                    => forks[LEFT(i)] = "free" /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = 0
       /\ flag = 0
       /\ maxFlag = 0
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE num + 1
       /\ flag' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE flag + 1
       /\ maxFlag' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE maxFlag + 1
       /\ maxNum' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE maxNum + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers
                 /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Remove(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
                 /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = readers
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE
VARIABLES chunk, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file = FILE
    /\ chunk = 1
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ receivedChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ chunk <= Len(file)
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ chunk' = chunk + 1
    /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunk \in Nat
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ receivedChunks \in Seq

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunk, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE, ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
           /\ c \in free
           /\ free' = free \ {c}
           /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
           /\ c \in Pages
           /\ c \in allocated
           /\ free' = free \cup {c}
           /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextMsgSeq, nextMsg

Init == 
  /\ subscribers = <<>>
  /\ messages = <<>>
  /\ nextMsgId = 0
  /\ nextMsgSeq = 0
  /\ nextMsg = <<>>

Next == 
  /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
  /\ nextMsgSeq' = nextMsgSeq + 1
  /\ nextMsg' = <<nextMsgId, nextMsgSeq>>
  /\ subscribers' = subscribers
  /\ messages' = messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextMsgSeq, nextMsg>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = [wants' EXCEPT ![1] = 0]
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants' EXCEPT ![0] = 0]
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0]
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0]
  \/ /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node : counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> 
                IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]]
          /\ \A m \in Node : m # n => counts'[m] = counts[m]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
         /\ \A n \in Node : counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]
         /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] \in Nat
